name: AAV-hTERT aging gene-therapy registry exists but has unknown status and no posted results
summary: The only identified human AAV-hTERT aging registry entry is not efficacy evidence.
statement: The Libella AAV-hTERT aging phase 1 registry lists a planned five-person single-arm study with safety, telomerase activity, telomere length, biomarker, immune, and physical-function endpoints, but the record still had unknown status and no posted results in the June 15, 2026 retirement sweep.
time_horizon: Registry record last updated December 10, 2019, with estimated completion in January 2021; no posted results as of the June 15, 2026 retirement sweep
caveats: No results are posted in the registry record.
The study is single-arm and very small.
Unknown status and lack of updates make it unsuitable as evidence of benefit or safety.
